```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
outpath <- here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs")
wpi <- read_table(here("analysis", "genetic_diversity", "outputs", "58-Sceloporus_10kb_windowpi.windowed.pi"))

i  <- 
  wpi %>% 
  count(CHROM) %>% 
  arrange(desc(n)) %>% 
  filter(n > 1000) %>% 
  pull(CHROM)

gg_df <-
  wpi %>%
  filter(CHROM %in% i) %>%
  mutate(CUMSUM = cumsum(BIN_START)) %>%
  mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = i)) 

pdf(here(outpath, "windowed_pi.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_vline(aes(xintercept = BIN_START, col = PI), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(x = BIN_START, y = PI), alpha = 0.9, lwd = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~CHROM, scales = "fixed", ncol = 1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10), legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1) +
  labs(y = expression("Mean " * pi * " (10kb window)"), col = "-log(mean p) (10kb window)") 
dev.off()
```

```{r}
gea <- read_csv(here("analysis", "gea", "outputs", "gea_gene_snp.csv"))
hsp <-
  gea %>% 
  filter(grepl("Heat shock protein", full_name)) %>%
  rename(CHROM = scaffold) %>%
  mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = i)) %>%
  # mutate(BIN_START = floor(start / 10000) * 10000) %>%
  mutate(BIN_START = floor(start / 10000) * 10000) %>%
  group_by(CHROM, BIN_START) %>%
  summarise(pcount = n()) 

top <- 
  gea %>%
  #head(1000) %>% 
  rename(CHROM = scaffold) %>%
  mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = i)) %>%
  mutate(BIN_START = floor(start / 10000) * 10000) %>%
  group_by(CHROM, BIN_START) %>%
  summarise(pcount = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  drop_na(CHROM)

# Check difference in number of SNPs counted
print((sum(top$pcount) - nrow(gea)))


outpath <- here("analysis", "gea", "plots")
pdf(here(outpath, "windowed_pi_gea.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
ggplot(gg_df) +
  geom_vline(data = top, aes(xintercept = BIN_START, col = log(pcount)), alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_line(aes(x = BIN_START, y = PI), alpha = 0.9, lwd = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~CHROM, scales = "fixed", ncol = 1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10), legend.position = "bottom") +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "plasma", direction = -1) +
  labs(y = expression("Mean " * pi * " (10kb window)"), col = "log(# Sig. SNPs) (10kb window)") 

dev.off()
```

```{r}
# manhattan plots
pdf(here(outpath, "mahattan_hex.pdf"), width = 2, height = 20)
ggplot() +
  geom_hex(data = sig, aes(x = start, y = -log(p.adj)), bins = 50) +
  scale_fill_viridis_c(option = "plasma") +
  facet_wrap(~scaffold, ncol = 1) +
  theme_classic() +
  labs(x = "Position", y = "-log(p)", col = "Chromosome") +
  scale_x_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(expand = c(0, 0)) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10), legend.position = "bottom") 
dev.off()
```

```{r}
top100k <- 
  gea %>%
  #head(1000) %>% 
  rename(CHROM = scaffold) %>%
  mutate(CHROM = factor(CHROM, levels = i)) %>%
  mutate(BIN_START = floor(start / 100000) * 100000) %>%
  group_by(CHROM, BIN_START) %>%
  summarise(pcount = n()) %>%
  ungroup() %>%
  drop_na(CHROM)

pdf(here(outpath, "windowed_gea.pdf"), width = 12, height = 10)
ggplot(top100k) +
  geom_line(aes(x = BIN_START, y = (pcount)), alpha = 0.9, lwd = 0.5) +
  scale_x_continuous(labels = scales::comma, expand = c(0, 0)) +
  scale_y_continuous(labels = scales::comma) +
  theme_classic() +
  facet_wrap(~CHROM, scales = "fixed", ncol = 1) +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.title.x = element_blank(), 
        axis.line.x = element_blank(),
        strip.background = element_blank(),
        strip.text.x = element_text(hjust = 0, size = 10), legend.position = "bottom") 
dev.off()
```
